_comment: Copy this file to config.json to override defaults. config.json is gitignored.

rateLimit._comment: Max Gmail API calls per windowMs milliseconds. Increase carefully — free tier = 250 units/sec.

fetch._comment: Hard cap on messages fetched per summarize_inbox call. Higher = slower + more quota used.

summarizer._comment: How many urgent/actionable/cluster items to include in the report.

mcpServer._comment: Transport type. Currently only 'stdio' is supported (required for Ollama/Claude Desktop).
